name: Pasta Ooooh Baby I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 2 Large tomatoes (firm but thick and juicy)
8 ounces Rigatoni, ziti, or other pasta
1 tablespoon Minced fresh basil or thyme
1 lb. sliced 3/4-inch thick Fresh ground pepper to taste
2 Medium yellow summer squash (about 1 lb., sliced 3/4-inch)
Freshly grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and salt it.
2. Core the tomatoes and make an X on the blossom end. Plunge them into boiling water for 20 to 25 seconds, then remove with a slotted spoon. Cool under cold running water, peel, and cut into wedges. Reserve.
3. In a large sauté pan or frying pan, heat oil over high heat until sizzling hot. Add zucchini and summer squash and cook, stirring and tossing, for 4 to 6 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and add scallions, onion, and garlic. Cook, stirring often, for another 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms, reserved tomatoes, basil, salt, pepper, and cayenne. Bring the mixture to a boil and immediately cover the pan tightly. Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Remove lid and adjust seasonings as needed. Spoon the sauce over drained hot pasta and add freshly grated cheese. Serve 4 entrees or 6 appetizers.
